title: Lemon Roasted Potatoes
description: Baby potatoes roasted at high heat with lemon, garlic, and oregano until golden and crispy. A bright, versatile side that pairs with almost anything.

instructions.text: Toss halved potatoes with olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper until evenly coated. Spread cut-side down in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Roast 30–35 minutes until golden brown and crispy, turning once halfway through.

notes:
The lemon juice will look like a lot but it reduces as the potatoes roast, concentrating into a tangy glaze on the cut sides.

Don't crowd the pan -- potatoes steam instead of roast if packed too tightly. Use two sheet pans if needed.
